# UNKNOWN

**Enumeration Case**

The status is unknown.

## Declaration

```swift
const String UNKNOWN;
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **ACCEPTED**: The participant accepted the invitation.
- **PENDING**: The participant was invited but hasn’t accepted.

items.description: The participant was invited but hasn’t accepted.
items.name: PENDING

title: UNKNOWN
